description: A linked external account or website not on AT Protocol. Displayed on the user's profile and optionally rendered in the ATmosphere Stream via feed ingestion.

main.description: Record representing a single external account or website linked by the user.

platform.description: The platform or type of external account.

url.description: The profile or site URL. Displayed as a clickable link on the user's profile.

label.description: Optional display name for this account (e.g., 'My Blog', 'Photography').

feedUrl.description: Optional RSS or Atom feed URL. Auto-discovered or manually provided. Used for content rendering in the ATmosphere Stream.

createdAt.description: Client-declared timestamp when this record was originally created.
